title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Kolte-Patil Developers

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Kolte-Patil Developers
jsonLd.description:
Kolte-Patil Developers has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Varanasi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Kolte-Patil Developers:
Kolte-Patil Developers is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kolte-Patil Developers!
